docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOHR, JANET AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JOHN (JOHNNIE) SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION RE: ORIGINAL LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOHR, JANET

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOHR, JANET RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JOHN (JOHNNIE) THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 66 GRANADA AVENUE, FRONT BEDROOM, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94122, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JOHN (JOHNNIE)
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOHR, JANET SERVED JAN-31-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JOHN (JOHNNIE)
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF LOHR, JANET AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JOHN (JOHNNIE)
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JOHN (JOHNNIE)
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOHR, JANET AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JOHN (JOHNNIE)
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE ($28.33) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOHR, JANET
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JOHN (JOHNNIE)
